bead.title: [read-coverage] add MCP worker status tools (list/show/log)
bead.description: FEAT-002/013 gap. HTTP has GET /api/agent/workers, GET /api/agent/workers/{id}, GET /api/agent/workers/{id}/log. MCP has no worker tools at all. Agents coordinating or monitoring parallel workers cannot query worker state via MCP. Add ddx_worker_list, ddx_worker_show, ddx_worker_log MCP tools.

No tests added for the three tools (e.g., MCP tool coverage tests akin to the prior `ce6663d0` test commit).
